mode.title: Scraping Mode
mode.description: urls: scrape specific company URLs. search: find companies by filters and scrape them. hybrid: search then scrape additional results.

startUrls.title: Company URLs
startUrls.description: Crunchbase company URLs to scrape (for urls mode). Supports organization, company, or person URLs.

searchQueries.title: Search Keywords
searchQueries.description: Search Crunchbase by keyword (for search or hybrid mode). Combine with filters below.

location.title: Location Filter
location.description: Filter by headquarters location (e.g. 'San Francisco, California', 'United States', 'London, United Kingdom')

maxCompanies.title: Max Companies
maxCompanies.description: Maximum number of companies to scrape (max 500)

maxFundingRounds.title: Max Funding Rounds per Company
maxFundingRounds.description: Maximum funding rounds to extract per company

extractPeople.title: Extract People
extractPeople.description: Extract founders, executives, board members, and team

extractFunding.title: Extract Funding Rounds
extractFunding.description: Extract funding round details (amount, type, date, investors, valuation)

extractInvestors.title: Extract Investors
extractInvestors.description: Extract investor list with names and types

extractContacts.title: Extract Contact Info
extractContacts.description: Extract contact email and phone number when available

maxRetries.title: Max Retries per URL
maxRetries.description: Number of retry attempts on failure

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: POST URL for progress notifications. Receives JSON with stats every 10 companies.
